steps.title: Rewrite as standard quadratic
steps.content:
Distribute and move everything to one side:
$$x(kx - 112) = -16 \;\Rightarrow\; kx^{2} - 112x + 16 = 0$$

steps.title: Apply discriminant condition
steps.content:
For two distinct real solutions, the discriminant must be positive: $b^{2} - 4ac > 0$.
$$(-112)^{2} - 4(k)(16) > 0$$
$$12{,}544 - 64k > 0 \;\Rightarrow\; k \lt 196$$
Since $k$ is an integer, the greatest possible value is $k = 195$.

The answer is 195.
